prompt: Silent scene with ambient distant tower beacons pulsing through haze, distant traffic wash. Background: looking east. the district skyline dropping away into surveillance towers. the surveillance district skyline blinking beyond the ledge. tower beacons pulse across the skyline. Slow pan or gentle crane, wide establishing shot, eye_level angle, focused on character, Hold the whole roof to expose how alone she is. Nova scans the district from the rooftop ledge.. Nova (30s, female, lean build, shoulder-length auburn hair, wearing weatherproof black coat over a charcoal sweater) at frame_left, positioned on north side of the space, eyes scanning, expression carefully neutral, jaw slightly set, looking at distance Nova: moves from frame_left to frame_center. establish the watch position before the warning lands. The silence is about to break. We see this through Nova's eyes. The audience realizes Nova is exposed on the roof with no cover. She is waiting for a signal that does not come fast enough.
action_summary: Nova scans the district from the rooftop ledge.
